subcodes.first_line: O thou who art nigh unto the Celestial Throne! Make thou this dust-laden earth to be perfumed with the fragrance of musk and ambergris through the wafting breaths [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مقرب درگاه کبریاء این تراب اغبر را برائحه مشک و عنبر معطر نما یعنی بنفحات
subcodes.subjects: @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @consorting with all; being kind; loving to all, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world, @spiritual transformation
